inputs.label: Total Production Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the period. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Scrap Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units scrapped due to defects or waste. Direct measure from quality control (Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Rework Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Units that required rework but not scrapped. Important for total waste analysis (Lean).

inputs.label: Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to produce one unit including materials, labor, overhead. Used for financial impact (Managerial Accounting).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost to rework one unit. Typically lower than original cost but significant (Lean Accounting).

inputs.label: Period Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the analysis period. Used for rate normalization (standard reporting).

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs (risk management).

suggestedActions: scrapRate > 0.05 ? 'Investigate root causes of scrap: implement poka-yoke or process control.' : ''
reworkRate > 0.05 ? 'Analyze rework drivers: consider training or standard work.' : ''
totalWasteCost > 10000 ? 'Conduct cost-benefit analysis for process improvement.' : ''
